article.title: Welcome to PreTeXt.Plus!
article.p:
This is a sample project to get you started. You can edit this content using the PreTeXt markup language.
\left|\sum_{i=0}^n a_i\right|\leq\sum_{i=0}^n|a_i|

statement.p: You can now upload images to use in your documents. Check out the Assets menu in the table of contents panel on the left.
For more information on how to use PreTeXt, please use the Help menu above.

article.p: Feel free to delete this sample content and start creating your own project. Happy writing!
